member.name: T:SadConsole.Configuration.ConfigurationImGui
member.summary: Extensions to enable ImGui with SadConsole.

member.name: M:SadConsole.Configuration.ConfigurationImGui.EnableImGui(SadConsole.Configuration.Builder,System.String,System.Single,System.Boolean,System.Action{SadConsole.ImGuiSystem.Rendering.ImGuiMonoGameComponent})
member.summary: Adds the ImGui MonoGame component to MonoGame.
member.param: The config builder.
The font file to use with ImGui. Defaults to 'Roboto-Regular.ttf'.
The font size to use with ImGui. Defaults to 16.
Enables the docking feature of ImGui. Defaults to false.
A callback to add objects to the ImGui MonoGame component.

member.name: M:SadConsole.Configuration.ConfigurationImGui.EnableImGuiDebugger(SadConsole.Configuration.Builder,SadConsole.Input.Keys)
member.summary: Adds a component that uses the specified hotkey to invoke .
member.param: The config builder.
The keyboard key to start the debugger.

member.name: M:SadConsole.ImGuiSystem.Rendering.ImGuiRenderer.UpdateInput
member.summary: Sends XNA input state to ImGui

member.name: M:SadConsole.ImGuiSystem.Rendering.ImGuiRenderer.RenderDrawData(Hexa.NET.ImGui.ImDrawData*)
member.summary: Gets the geometry as set up by ImGui and sends it to the graphics device

member.name: M:SadConsole.ImGuiSystem.Rendering.ImGuiRenderer.UpdateEffect(Microsoft.Xna.Framework.Graphics.Texture2D)
member.summary: Updates the to the current matrices and texture

member.name: T:SadConsole.ImGuiSystem.Rendering.ImGuiRenderer`1
member.summary: ImGui renderer

member.name: P:SadConsole.ImGuiSystem.Rendering.ImGuiRenderer`1.WantsMouseCapture
member.summary: When , indicates that the ImGui input system is going to use the mouse, for example when the mouse is over a UI element; otherwise .

member.name: P:SadConsole.ImGuiSystem.Rendering.ImGuiRenderer`1.WantsKeyboardCapture
member.summary: When , indicates that the ImGui input system is going to use the keyboard, for example when focus is on a textbox; otherwise .

member.name: F:SadConsole.ImGuiSystem.Rendering.ImGuiRenderer`1.UIObjects
member.summary: A list of objects to draw in ImGui.

member.name: M:SadConsole.ImGuiSystem.Rendering.ImGuiRenderer`1.UpdateTexture(Hexa.NET.ImGui.ImTextureDataPtr)
member.summary: Updates the texture resource based on the current status of the specified texture data.
member.remarks: Call this method to synchronize the texture resource with the state indicated by the texture data. Ensure that the texture data is valid and properly initialized before invoking this method.
member.param: A pointer to the texture data that determines the operation to perform. The status of this data specifies whether to create, update, or destroy the associated texture.

member.name: M:SadConsole.ImGuiSystem.Rendering.ImGuiRenderer`1.BindTexture(`0)
member.summary: Creates a pointer to a texture, which can be passed through ImGui calls. That pointer is then used by ImGui to let us know what texture to draw.

member.name: M:SadConsole.ImGuiSystem.Rendering.ImGuiRenderer`1.UnbindTexture(Hexa.NET.ImGui.ImTextureID)
member.summary: Removes a previously created texture pointer, releasing its reference and allowing it to be deallocated.

member.name: M:SadConsole.ImGuiSystem.Rendering.ImGuiRenderer`1.UnbindTexture(`0)
member.summary: Removes a previously created texture pointer, releasing its reference and allowing it to be deallocated.

member.name: M:SadConsole.ImGuiSystem.Rendering.ImGuiRenderer`1.HasBoundTexture(`0)
member.summary: Returns whether a texture is already bound.
member.param: The SFML texture to check.
member.returns: if the texture is bound; otherwise .

member.name: M:SadConsole.ImGuiSystem.Rendering.ImGuiRenderer`1.GetBoundTexturePointer(`0)
member.summary: Gets the ImGui texture ID for a bound SFML texture.
member.param: The SFML texture.

member.name: M:SadConsole.ImGuiSystem.Rendering.ImGuiRenderer`1.ReplaceBoundTexture(Hexa.NET.ImGui.ImTextureID,`0)
member.summary: Replaces an already-bound texture with a new one, keeping the same ImGui texture ID.
member.param: The ImGui texture ID to update.
The new SFML texture.

member.name: M:SadConsole.ImGuiSystem.Rendering.ImGuiRenderer`1.BeforeLayoutInput(System.Single)
member.summary: Runs the ImGui input. Call before .
member.param: Time elapsed since last frame in seconds.

member.name: M:SadConsole.ImGuiSystem.Rendering.ImGuiRenderer`1.BeforeLayout
member.summary: Sets up ImGui for a new frame, should be called at frame start.

member.name: M:SadConsole.ImGuiSystem.Rendering.ImGuiRenderer`1.AfterLayout
member.summary: Asks ImGui for the generated geometry data and sends it to the graphics pipeline, should be called after the UI is drawn using ImGui.** calls.

member.name: M:SadConsole.ImGuiSystem.Rendering.ImGuiRenderer`1.UpdateInput
member.summary: Sends SFML input state to ImGui.

member.name: M:SadConsole.ImGuiSystem.Rendering.ImGuiRenderer`1.RenderDrawData(Hexa.NET.ImGui.ImDrawData*)
member.summary: Gets the geometry as set up by ImGui and sends it to the graphics device.

member.name: M:SadConsole.ImGuiSystem.Rendering.ImGuiRenderer`1.AddFontTTF(System.String,System.Single)
member.summary: Adds a TTF font file to ImGui.
member.param: Path to the TTF font file.
The font size in pixels.

member.name: M:SadConsole.ImGuiSystem.Rendering.ImGuiRenderer`1.SetDefaultFont(Hexa.NET.ImGui.ImFontPtr)
member.summary: Sets the default font for ImGui and rebuilds the font atlas.
member.param: The font to set as default.

member.name: T:SadConsole.ImGuiSystem.Rendering.ImGuiRenderer`1.TextureInfo
member.summary: Represents information about a texture, including its associated texture object and management status.
member.remarks: Initializes a new instance of the TextureInfo class with the specified texture, texture identifier, and management status.
member.param: The texture object to associate with this instance.
The unique identifier used to reference the texture for rendering operations.
A value indicating whether the texture is managed by the application. Set to if the texture should be automatically disposed when destroyed by ImGui; otherwise, .

member.name: M:SadConsole.ImGuiSystem.Rendering.ImGuiRenderer`1.TextureInfo.#ctor(`0,Hexa.NET.ImGui.ImTextureID,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Represents information about a texture, including its associated texture object and management status.
member.remarks: Initializes a new instance of the TextureInfo class with the specified texture, texture identifier, and management status.
member.param: The texture object to associate with this instance.
The unique identifier used to reference the texture for rendering operations.
A value indicating whether the texture is managed by the application. Set to if the texture should be automatically disposed when destroyed by ImGui; otherwise, .

member.name: P:SadConsole.ImGuiSystem.Rendering.ImGuiRenderer`1.TextureInfo.Texture
member.summary: Gets or sets the texture associated with the object.

member.name: P:SadConsole.ImGuiSystem.Rendering.ImGuiRenderer`1.TextureInfo.TextureID
member.summary: Gets or sets the ImGui texture identifier associated with this texture.

member.name: P:SadConsole.ImGuiSystem.Rendering.ImGuiRenderer`1.TextureInfo.IsManaged
member.summary: Indicates this texture instance is managed by ImGui.

member.name: T:SadConsole.ImGuiSystem.ImGuiObjectBase
member.summary: Represents an object drawn in ImGui.

member.name: P:SadConsole.ImGuiSystem.ImGuiObjectBase.IsVisible
member.summary: When true, this object should be drawn.

member.name: M:SadConsole.ImGuiSystem.ImGuiObjectBase.BuildUI(SadConsole.ImGuiSystem.Rendering.ImGuiRenderer)
member.summary: Draws this object.
member.param: The ImGui renderer drawing this object.

member.name: T:SadConsole.ImGuiSystem.ImGuiObjectCollection
member.summary: A collection of objects that can be added to a ImGui renderer.

member.name: M:SadConsole.ImGuiSystem.ImGuiObjectCollection.#ctor
member.summary: Creates a new instance of this object.

member.name: M:SadConsole.ImGuiSystem.ImGuiObjectCollection.BuildUI(SadConsole.ImGuiSystem.Rendering.ImGuiRenderer)
member.summary: Draws the objects contained in this collection if is .
member.param: The ImGui renderer.

member.name: T:SadConsole.ImGuiSystem.ImGuiGuardedValue`1
member.summary: Makes a copy of a value and allows it to be changed. The change can be committed or reverted.

member.name: F:SadConsole.ImGuiSystem.ImGuiGuardedValue`1.OriginalValue
member.summary: The original value.

member.name: F:SadConsole.ImGuiSystem.ImGuiGuardedValue`1.CurrentValue
member.summary: The current value.

member.name: M:SadConsole.ImGuiSystem.ImGuiGuardedValue`1.#ctor(`0)
member.summary: Creates a new instance of this structure, wrapping the provided value.
member.param: The original value.

member.name: M:SadConsole.ImGuiSystem.ImGuiGuardedValue`1.IsChanged
member.summary: Returns true when the original value doesn't equal the current value.
member.returns: A value to indicate changed state.

member.name: M:SadConsole.ImGuiSystem.ImGuiGuardedValue`1.Commit
member.summary: Sets the original value to the current value.

member.name: M:SadConsole.ImGuiSystem.ImGuiGuardedValue`1.Reset
member.summary: Sets the current value to the original value.

member.name: T:SadConsole.ImGuiSystem.ImGuiList`1
member.summary: Wraps a collection of objects for ImGui controls, like list boxes.

member.name: P:SadConsole.ImGuiSystem.ImGuiList`1.Names
member.summary: Each item's title.
member.remarks: Refreshed when this property is accessed.

member.name: P:SadConsole.ImGuiSystem.ImGuiList`1.Objects
member.summary: The objects wrapped by this list.

member.name: P:SadConsole.ImGuiSystem.ImGuiList`1.Count
member.summary: The number of items this list is wrapping.

member.name: F:SadConsole.ImGuiSystem.ImGuiList`1.SelectedItemIndex
member.summary: The selected index. Controlled by ImGui objects.

member.name: P:SadConsole.ImGuiSystem.ImGuiList`1.SelectedItem
member.summary: The selected item or .
member.exception: Thrown when the property is set to a value that doesn't exist in the collection.

member.name: M:SadConsole.ImGuiSystem.ImGuiList`1.#ctor(`0[])
member.summary: Creates a new list, wrapping the provided items.
member.param: The items to wrap.

member.name: M:SadConsole.ImGuiSystem.ImGuiList`1.#ctor(System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{`0})
member.summary: Creates a new list, wrapping the provided items.
member.param: The items to wrap.

member.name: M:SadConsole.ImGuiSystem.ImGuiList`1.#ctor(System.Int32,`0[])
member.summary: Creates a new list, wrapping the provided items, and sets which item is selected.
member.param: The 0-based index of the item to select.
The items to wrap.

member.name: M:SadConsole.ImGuiSystem.ImGuiList`1.#ctor(System.Int32,System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{`0})
member.summary: Creates a new list, wrapping the provided items, and sets which item is selected.
member.param: The 0-based index of the item to select.
The items to wrap.

member.name: M:SadConsole.ImGuiSystem.ImGuiList`1.IsItemSelected
member.summary: Indicates that an item is selected.

member.name: T:SadConsole.ImGuiSystem.ImGuiListEnum`1
member.summary: Wraps an enum type for ImGui controls, like listboxes.

member.name: F:SadConsole.ImGuiSystem.ImGuiListEnum`1.Names
member.summary: A collection of each enum name.

member.name: F:SadConsole.ImGuiSystem.ImGuiListEnum`1.Values
member.summary: A collection of each enum value.

member.name: P:SadConsole.ImGuiSystem.ImGuiListEnum`1.Count
member.summary: The count of the enums items.

member.name: M:SadConsole.ImGuiSystem.ImGuiListEnum`1.GetValueFromIndex(System.Int32)
member.summary: Gets a value from an index.
member.param: Index of the value to get.

member.name: M:SadConsole.ImGuiSystem.ImGuiListEnum`1.GetIndexFromValue(`0)
member.summary: Gets an index from a value.
member.param: The value to get an index from.

member.name: T:SadConsole.ImGuiSystem.Types.Mirror
member.summary: The mirroring mode

member.name: F:SadConsole.ImGuiSystem.Types.Mirror.None
member.summary: No mirroring set.

member.name: F:SadConsole.ImGuiSystem.Types.Mirror.Vertical
member.summary: Mirror vertically.

member.name: F:SadConsole.ImGuiSystem.Types.Mirror.Horizontal
member.summary: Mirror horizontally.

member.name: F:SadConsole.ImGuiSystem.Types.Mirror.Both
member.summary: Mirror vertically and horizontally.

member.name: T:SadConsole.Components.TitleComponent
member.summary: A component that holds a title for a screen object.

member.name: P:SadConsole.Components.TitleComponent.Title
member.summary: The title of the screen object.

member.name: M:SadConsole.Components.TitleComponent.#ctor(System.String)
member.summary: Creates a new instance of this component.
member.param: The title of the screen object.

member.name: T:SadConsole.ScreenObjectExtensionsDebug
member.summary: Extensions for working with the component.

member.name: M:SadConsole.ScreenObjectExtensionsDebug.GetTitle(SadConsole.IScreenObject)
member.summary: Gets the title component of the screen object.
member.param: The screen object to get the title from.
member.returns: The title component if found; otherwise, null.

member.name: M:SadConsole.ScreenObjectExtensionsDebug.SetTitle(SadConsole.IScreenObject,System.String)
member.summary: Sets the title of the screen object, adding a title component if one does not already exist.
member.param: The screen object to set the title for.
The title.

member.name: M:SadConsole.ScreenObjectExtensionsDebug.RemoveTitle(SadConsole.IScreenObject)
member.summary: Removes the title component from the screen object if it exists.
member.param: The screen object to remove the title from.

member.name: T:SadConsole.Debug.ImGuiDebugger
member.summary: The SadConsole debugger class.

member.name: P:SadConsole.Debug.ImGuiDebugger.Instance
member.summary: Gets the singleton instance of the ImGuiDebugger class, providing access to its debugging functionalities.

member.name: P:SadConsole.Debug.ImGuiDebugger.IsOpened
member.summary: Gets a value indicating whether the associated element is currently opened.

member.name: E:SadConsole.Debug.ImGuiDebugger.Opened
member.summary: An event that's raised when the debugger is opened. True is passed if it's the first time it's opened.

member.name: E:SadConsole.Debug.ImGuiDebugger.Closed
member.summary: An event that's raised when the debugger is closed.

member.name: M:SadConsole.Debug.ImGuiDebugger.Start(SadConsole.ImGuiSystem.Rendering.ImGuiRenderer)
member.summary: Starts the debugger.

member.name: M:SadConsole.Debug.ImGuiDebugger.Stop
member.summary: Stops the debugger.

member.name: T:SadConsole.Debug.ImGuiDebugger.Settings
member.summary: The settings used by the debugger.

member.name: F:SadConsole.Debug.ImGuiDebugger.Settings.Color_FocusedObj
member.summary: The color of the focused object.

member.name: F:SadConsole.Debug.ImGuiDebugger.Settings.Color_PanelHeader
member.summary: The color of panel headers of objects.

member.name: E:SadConsole.Debug.GuiTopBar.Closed
member.summary: Occurs when a request to close the component is made.

member.name: M:SadConsole.ExtensionsSystem.GetDebuggerDisplayValue(System.Object)
member.summary: Searches the object for a and returns its value. If not found, returns .
member.param: The object to check.

member.summary: Extensions to convert to/from .

member.summary: Converts a to a .

member.summary: Gets a representing the UV coordinates of a within a size.
member.param: The coordinates within the size.
The size.

member.name: T:Hexa.NET.ImGui.StyleExtensions
member.summary: Extensions that help with getting ImGui style values.

member.name: M:Hexa.NET.ImGui.StyleExtensions.GetSpacing(Hexa.NET.ImGui.ImGuiStylePtr,System.Numerics.Vector2@,System.Numerics.Vector2@)
member.summary: Gets the frame padding and item spacing values.
member.param: The style object.
Frame padding.
Item spacing.

member.name: M:Hexa.NET.ImGui.StyleExtensions.GetWidthOfItems(Hexa.NET.ImGui.ImGuiStylePtr,System.String[])
member.summary: Calculates the text size and adds frame padding * 2 for each item provided.
member.param: The style object.
String values to calculate.

member.name: M:Hexa.NET.ImGui.ImGuiSC.ConfirmPopup(System.ReadOnlySpan{System.Byte},System.ReadOnlySpan{System.Byte},System.Action,System.Action)
member.summary: Displays a confirmation popup dialog with a specified title and executes actions based on user response.
member.remarks: The popup presents 'Yes' and 'Cancel' options to the user. The corresponding action is invoked after the user makes a selection. The method should be called within the appropriate ImGui frame context.
member.param: A read-only span of bytes that uniquely identifies the popup instance. Used to manage the popup's open state.
A read-only span of bytes representing the text to display in the popup dialog.
The action to execute if the user confirms the operation.
The action to execute if the user cancels the operation. This parameter is optional.
member.returns: true if the confirmation popup is currently open; otherwise, false.

member.name: M:Hexa.NET.ImGui.FileListBox.Draw
member.summary: Draws the list box.

member.name: M:Hexa.NET.ImGui.FileListBox.Draw(System.Boolean@,System.Boolean@)
member.summary: Draws the list box.
member.param: True when an item is single-clicked and is true.
member.returns: True when an item is selected or highlighted.

member.name: M:Hexa.NET.ImGui.SettingsTable.EndTable
member.summary: Call if returns true."/>
